Label: Unusable
Definition: No usable public record; source absent, paywalled, or removed

Label: Low
Definition: Single low-credibility source; blog, social media, or unverified report

Label: Medium
Definition: One or more credible secondary sources (journalism, NGO, government summary)

Label: High
Definition: Primary documentation (official report, court record, regulator finding, or investigation with methodology)

Label: Very High
Definition: Multiple independent primary sources with full methodology, including regulatory, judicial, or academic peer-reviewed documentation
